intent: Convert design-upgrade-loop from Codex-format to valid Cursor skill with correct frontmatter, Windows-safe script paths, and Cursor-native tool guidance.

gap_analysis.description: SKILL.md missing YAML frontmatter (name, description required by Cursor)
gap_analysis.patch: Add frontmatter block at top of SKILL.md with name: design-upgrade-loop and description

gap_analysis.description: Description in inventory and body text references 'Codex' not 'Cursor'
gap_analysis.patch: Replace 'Codex' with 'Cursor' in body where agent runtime is implied

gap_analysis.description: Script invocation uses 'python3' bash style; Windows environment uses 'python'
gap_analysis.patch: Change 'python scripts/...' call in Step 6 to use 'python' on Windows

gap_analysis.description: Browser guidance does not mention cursor-ide-browser MCP (Cursor native)
gap_analysis.patch: Add cursor-ide-browser MCP as first-priority option in Browser and MCP guidance section

gap_analysis.description: agents/openai.yaml is a Codex-specific packaging artifact, not used by Cursor
gap_analysis.patch: Keep file (non-destructive), but do NOT reference it from SKILL.md; note in skill body that it is Codex-only

gap_analysis.description: source-routing.md dashboard references do not include 2026 sources (Tremor, Horizon UI)
gap_analysis.patch: Append 2026 dashboard reference section to references/source-routing.md
